note: Source of truth for entity and field descriptions. SQLite import is planned (see migrations/) — do not hand-edit the DB table directly; run the import script instead to avoid overwrites.

Customer.description: Master record for each CRM customer account. Links to addresses, sales history, and support interactions. Primary join key for all CRM-scoped intents.

customer_id.description: Surrogate primary key. Referenced as FK in CustomerAddress and Sales.

first_name.description: Customer given name. Display use only — do not filter or group by this field.

last_name.description: Customer family name. Combine with first_name for full name display.

email.description: Primary contact email. Nullable — not all legacy records have email populated.

created_at.description: Record creation timestamp. Use for cohort analysis and customer-since queries.

CustomerAddress.description: Ship-to and bill-to addresses for each customer. One customer may have multiple address rows; the CRM_Join intent resolves the primary address via the customer_id FK join.

address_id.description: Surrogate primary key for the address row.

customer_id.description: FK to Customer.customer_id — the join key used by the CRM_Join intent.

street.description: Street line. Used in contact-record and delivery-address queries.

city.description: City. Common grouping dimension for regional sales analysis.

state.description: State / province code. Two-character ISO where available.

zip.description: Postal code. Nullable for international records.

Sales.description: Transaction-level sales records. Links each sale to a customer and a product line. Used by revenue-per-customer and sales-trend intents. The customer_id FK enables joining to Customer and CustomerAddress for enriched output.

sale_id.description: Surrogate primary key for the sales transaction.

customer_id.description: FK to Customer.customer_id — enables customer-revenue aggregation.

sale_date.description: Transaction date. Primary time dimension for trend and period-over-period queries.

amount_dollars.description: Sale value in USD. The core metric for all revenue intents. Never null.

product_line.description: Product line label (e.g. 'Aerospace', 'Defense'). Nullable — legacy records may be unclassified.

ProductionSchedule.description: Master production schedule — one row per scheduled production run. Drives throughput, OEE, and on-time delivery intents. Source table for the Manufacturing and Work_Orders perspectives.

line_id.description: FK to ProductionLines.line_id — identifies which line runs this job.

product_line.description: Product family (Aerospace, Defense, Commercial). Nullable for legacy runs.

planned_start.description: Planned start datetime. Delta from actual_start = schedule adherence.

planned_end.description: Planned end datetime. Delta from actual_end = on-time delivery metric.

actual_start.description: Actual start datetime. Null if run has not started yet.

actual_end.description: Actual end datetime. Null if run is still in progress.

QualityIncidents.description: Quality event log — one row per defect or non-conformance event. Primary source for defect-severity and scrap-rate intents. Joins to ProductionSchedule via schedule_id for root-cause analysis.

schedule_id.description: FK to ProductionSchedule — links defect to the specific production run.

defect_type.description: Categorical defect classification (e.g. 'Solder Void', 'Misalignment'). Core grouping dimension for quality intents.

severity.description: Severity level: 1=Minor, 2=Major, 3=Critical. Used for weighted defect-severity metrics.

detected_at.description: Timestamp of defect detection. Use for time-trend and shift-analysis queries.

resolved_at.description: Timestamp of resolution. Null if still open. Delta = resolution-cycle-time metric.

EquipmentMetrics.description: Time-series equipment performance readings. Feeds OEE (Availability × Performance × Quality) calculations. One row per machine per measurement interval.

equipment_id.description: FK to the equipment master. Identifies the machine.

recorded_at.description: Measurement timestamp. Primary time dimension for OEE trend queries.

availability.description: Availability ratio (0–1). Planned production time minus downtime divided by planned time.

performance.description: Performance ratio (0–1). Actual output rate versus ideal output rate.

quality_rate.description: Quality ratio (0–1). Good parts divided by total parts produced.

oee.description: Composite OEE score = availability × performance × quality_rate. Pre-computed for query performance.

Suppliers.description: Supplier master record. Used by procurement, payables, and parts-sourcing intents. Each supplier is linked to purchase orders and incoming inspection records.

supplier_name.description: Legal trading name of the supplier.

category.description: Commodity category (e.g. 'Raw Material', 'Sub-Assembly', 'MRO'). Primary grouping dimension for spend analysis.

country.description: Country of origin. Used for supply-chain risk and lead-time intents.

lead_days.description: Average lead time in calendar days. Key input for inventory and demand-forecast intents.

active.description: Boolean. False = supplier is deactivated; exclude from new-order routing queries.
